title: Error contract: exit-code taxonomy and JSON error envelope (issue 31)
description: Error contract: exit-code taxonomy and JSON error envelope (issue 31)
acceptance_criteria: Exit codes follow the taxonomy (64 usage, 65 corrupt state, 69 unavailable, 70 internal, 73 persist-fail); domain errors emit a human stderr line plus a {error:{code,message,hint}} envelope with --json/--jsonl or APS_ERROR_JSON=1; corrupt note.json/profile.json exits 65 instead of returning the initial value; stdout stays empty on error; tests and smoke assert all of it.
